sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106405" key="u(droqhriko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρο-θηρικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n106405.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for fishing,</tr_> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg001:14:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.24</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg001:15:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
